title: Quartet
content:
In music, a quartet or quartette (,,,,) is an ensemble of four singers or instrumental performers; or a musical composition for four voices or instruments. Classical. String quartet. In Classical music, one of the most common combinations of four instruments in chamber music is the string quartet. String quartets most often consist of two violin s, a viola, and a cello.

The particular choice and number of instruments derives from the registers of the human voice: soprano, alto, tenor and bass. In the string quartet, two violins play the soprano and alto vocal registers, the viola plays the tenor register and the cello plays the bass register.
